Insights.Text: Qatar lost the first half - 3/4 Last Matches

Items.Title: Canada score six but historic win marred by Kone injury
Items.Description: Ismael Kone's serious-looking injury left Canada manager Jesse Marsch in tears and overshadowed their first-ever World Cup finals win as they thrashed nine-man Qatar 6-0.

Items.Title: Kone injury is a 'huge loss' - Marsch
Items.Description: Canada coach Jessie Marsch praises his players for their 6-0 win over Qatar at the 2026 World Cup in Vancouver, but says losing Ismael Kone to a serious-looking injury is a "huge loss".

Items.Title: David scores hat-trick as Canada thrash NINE-man Qatar
Items.Description: Canada are on the brink of qualifying for the World Cup knockout stages after a Jonathan David treble inspired a 6-0 win over woeful nine-man Qatar - in a result marred by a serious leg injury for midfielder Ismael Kone.
